name: Toyota Camry
description: A refined sedan offering smooth performance, advanced safety features, and exceptional fuel efficiency for everyday driving.

name: Honda CR-V
description: A spacious and versatile SUV built for family adventures, with a comfortable interior and reliable performance.

name: BMW 3 Series
description: The ultimate driving machine — a luxury sedan delivering exhilarating performance with cutting-edge technology.

name: Tesla Model 3
description: A fully electric sedan with autopilot capabilities, zero emissions, and lightning-fast acceleration.

name: Ford Mustang GT
description: An iconic American muscle car with thunderous V8 power, aggressive styling, and pure driving thrills.

name: Hyundai i20
description: A stylish and feature-packed hatchback, perfect for city driving with impressive fuel economy.

name: Mercedes C-Class
description: Timeless elegance meets modern innovation — a luxury sedan with a sumptuous interior and refined dynamics.

name: Jeep Wrangler
description: The legendary off-road icon built to conquer any terrain with rugged capability and open-air freedom.

name: Audi A4
description: Progressive luxury with Quattro all-wheel drive — a sophisticated sedan for those who demand the best.

name: Maruti Swift
description: India's favourite hatchback — agile, fuel-efficient, and fun to drive with a bold sporty design.

name: Kia Seltos
description: A connected and feature-rich compact SUV with bold design, turbo power, and a high-tech cabin.

name: Porsche 911
description: The definitive sports car — precision engineering, breathtaking speed, and an unmistakable silhouette.
